errors.message: Initial DESeq2 sample-sheet style submissions duplicated bound datasets and failed with duplicate row names.

additional_data.resolution: Switched away from sample-sheet style input binding and tested explicit datasets_per_level submission.

errors.message: BioBlend collapsed nested DESeq2 conditionals to the wrong branch during tool submission.

additional_data.resolution: Bypassed BioBlend and submitted directly to /api/tools.

errors.message: Temporary edgeR pivot did not solve the serialization problem because flattened inputs were still mapped incorrectly.

additional_data.resolution: Returned to DESeq2 after confirming flattened repeat-field direct API submission worked for 3xTG.

errors.message: The 5xFAD matrix contains non-integer assay values that DESeq2 rejects.

additional_data.resolution: Derived integer-rounded per-sample files for a DESeq2-specific rerun.

errors.message: The integerized 5xFAD DESeq2 rerun completed successfully after replacing non-integer input values with derived rounded counts.
The live goseq outputs return numeric KEGG category IDs without pathway-name labels, so pathway names had to be reconstructed by matching KEGG codes against the hidden reference file.
The completed live Galaxy workflow produced a final pathway table, but its KEGG p-values only partially matched the hidden reference and two reference pathways were missing from the live outputs.

missing_reference_pathways: Proteoglycans in cancer Homo sapiens hsa05205
Pathogenic Escherichia coli infection Homo sapiens hsa05130
